_meta.description: Field documentation for GEM parser/analyzer output files. Read this at session start to avoid field-name guessing.
_meta.changelog_7_15: v7.15 parser+analyzer updates: (1) BUGFIX - Jam attribution in line_actions. Previously 'jam' was assigned whenever Hero's final street action was all-in, conflating Hero-initiated shoves with Hero-called bluffcatches. Fixed: 'jam' = Hero bet/raised all-in (aggressive); 'xr-ai' = check-raise all-in; 'callAI' = Hero called villain's all-in (bluffcatch); 'xc-ai' = Hero check-called villain's all-in. Downstream: Top Losing Lines now distinguishes bluffcatch lines (xc-xc-xc-ai, call-call-callAI) from aggressive-jam lines. (2) New format tag 'MYSTERY_BOUNTY' - tournaments with 'Mystery Bounty' in name tagged distinctly from generic BOUNTY. Used by V15b to relax 5-jam threshold when Hero covers villain (6-fig mystery prize EV). (3) New detections: 'V15a 4BP Flat-Call Non-Premium' (Hero flats 4-bet at 40+ BB eff with <JJ, CLEAR), 'V15b 5-Bet Jam Non-Premium Deep' (Hero 5-jams at 40+ BB eff with <QQ, CLEAR or MARGINAL if MYSTERY_BOUNTY+covers), 'V15c Flat 5-Bet+ OOP Multiway' (Hero flats 5-bet+ OOP 3+way with <KK, CLEAR). V15c catches the 'QQ flat 6-bet + checkdown' pattern.
_meta.changelog_7_14: Two-pass v7.14: (1) Dave rules J33-J40 added to mistake detection. (2) Analyzer optimizations: hand_time field; stats_by_phase + intra_session_arc + eai_ev_adjusted; leak_persistence progress-vs-target; GTO export capped 30 with EV-delta sort; gem_hands_lean.json additive output.

gem_hands_json._description: List of hand dicts. Key field is 'id'. All 981+ hands in session.

format.description: Tournament format. v7.15: MYSTERY_BOUNTY tagged distinctly - massive 6-fig mystery prize EV relaxes covering-stack jam thresholds.

buyin.description: Buy-in in dollars (may be 0 if not parsed)

hand_time.description: v7.14 NEW. Time-of-day (HH:MM:SS) from HH header. Used for intra-session arc / tilt detection. Empty string if unparseable.

n_players.description: Actual players dealt in this hand

eff_pos.description: Effective position normalized for table size

stack_bb.description: Hero's stack in BB at hand start

eff_stack_bb.description: Effective stack (min of Hero and relevant villain) in BB

vpip.description: Hero voluntarily put money in pot

first_in.description: Hero was first to voluntarily enter (no prior raises)

opener_position.description: Position of first raiser (empty if Hero opened)

pf_raise_count.description: Total preflop raises in the hand

is_squeeze.description: Hero squeezed (3-bet with caller in between)

jammer_stack_bb.description: Stack of preflop jammer in BB

stacks_behind.description: Stacks of players yet to act

players_at_flop.description: Number of players who saw the flop

villain_bet_flop_first.description: Villain bet the flop before Hero acted

villain_folded_to_flop_cbet.description: Villain folded to Hero's flop c-bet

line_actions.description: Action sequence portion of line. Codes: 'cbet' (Hero c-bet flop as PFR), 'bet' (Hero bet non-cbet), 'raise' (Hero raised), 'call' (Hero called villain bet), 'x' (check through), 'xc' (check-call), 'xr' (check-raise), 'xf' (check-fold), 'fold' (fold after check-less), 'jam' (v7.15: Hero INITIATED all-in by bet/raise), 'xr-ai' (v7.15: Hero check-raise all-in), 'callAI' (v7.15: Hero CALLED villain's all-in = bluffcatch), 'xc-ai' (v7.15: Hero check-called villain's all-in = bluffcatch). The distinction between 'jam' and 'callAI'/'xc-ai' matters for losing-line analysis: bluffcatch lines are not aggression leaks.

one_and_done.description: Hero bet one street then gave up

missed_river_value.description: Flagged as missed river value opportunity

gem_stats_json._description: Aggregated session stats. Top-level keys below.

top_level_keys.volume: Session metadata (hands, tournaments, bullets, formats, date)
top_level_keys.tournament_list: List of {name, format, hands, buyin} per tournament
top_level_keys.core: Core stats: vpip, pfr, ats, af, vpip_pfr_gap, vpip_pfr_gap_nonblind, wwsf, non_sd_win, sd_aggressor_pct, caller_ip_flop_agg, ftb, check_raises, one_and_done. v7.13 Appendix K: ip_stab_rate (K3, target 40-60%), ip_stab_n/bet_n, float_turn_attack_rate (K3, target >50%), ip_caller_xr_rate/mw_rate (K1, MW target 0-5%), flop_lead_rate (K6, baseline 2-5%), flop_lead_n/bet_n, flop_lead_acceptable_boards
top_level_keys.ip_stab_by_board: K3: IP stab rate split by board type. board_kind -> {total, bet, pct}. Boards: two_high, low_paired, high_paired, mid_paired, low_straight, low_dry, connected_mid, a_high_dry, monotone, other
top_level_keys.flop_lead_by_board: K6: Flop lead rate (BB/SB caller) split by board type. Same board_kinds as ip_stab_by_board. Acceptable leads: low_paired (35-48%), low_straight (20-40%), connected_mid in 3BP shallow
top_level_keys.k4_srp_cbet_by_pos_depth: K4: HU SRP c-bet by Hero position x depth. Key = '{MP|CO|BTN}_{60BB+|30-45BB|<25BB}' -> {total, bet, pct}
top_level_keys.k4_targets: K4: Target c-bet% by position x depth for K4 comparison. Same key format as k4_srp_cbet_by_pos_depth
top_level_keys.k2_oop_pfr_matchup: K2: OOP PFR c-bet by matchup archetype. Warrior (EP/MP vs LP), Gentleman (LP vs LP), BvB. Each -> {total, bet, pct}
top_level_keys.positions: Per-position: {hands, vpip, pfr, open_pct, fi, opens}
top_level_keys.positional_pnl: Per-position: {hands, net_bb, bb_per_hand, bb_per_100, vpip_hands, vpip_net_bb, vpip_bb_per_hand}
top_level_keys.cbet: C-bet rates: hu_pct, hu_ip_pct, hu_oop_pct, mw_pct, turn_pct + opps/bets counts
top_level_keys.threebet_by_opener: 3-bet rate by opener position: EP/MP/LP/Blinds → {opps, bets, rate}
top_level_keys.threebet_by_hero_pos: 3-bet rate by Hero position: BTN/SB/BB/CO/HJ etc → {opps, bets, rate}
top_level_keys.stack_depth: By depth tier (<12BB/12-25/25-40/40+): {hands, vpip, pfr, rfi}
top_level_keys.sizing: Bet sizing by spot: {avg_pct, n, min_pct, max_pct} per flop_cbet_IP etc
top_level_keys.facing_bets: Hero facing bets: by street_size → {fold, call, raise counts}
top_level_keys.river_audit: River action counts: value_bet, check_sdv, bluff, call, fold_to_bet, check_giveup
top_level_keys.sb_bvb_preflop: SB BvB: limp/raise/fold counts and percentages, total
top_level_keys.eai: Equity All-In: preflop/postflop → ahead/flip/behind → {count, won, pct}. Also hands list.
top_level_keys.coolers: Cooler list: {count, rate, hands: [{id, hero, villain, board}]}
top_level_keys.mistakes: Mistake list: [{id, cards, pos, stack_bb, type, confidence, action_summary, tournament}]
top_level_keys.marginal_mistakes: Marginal mistake list (same schema as mistakes)
top_level_keys.preflop_deviations: Full deviation list: [{id, cards, pos, stack_bb, type, confidence, tournament, action_summary, chart, opener}]
top_level_keys.deep_runs: Deep run list: [{tournament, hands, start, peak, low, final, premiums_pct, eai_total/won/expected}]
top_level_keys.top_losing_lines: Top losing lines: [{line, count, net_bb, avg_bb, confidence, example_ids}]
top_level_keys.top_winning_lines: Top winning lines: [{line, count, net_bb, avg_bb}]
top_level_keys.showdown: Showdown stats: wtsd, wsd, saw_flop_vol, went_sd, won_sd
top_level_keys.tournament_phases: By phase: {late_reg, post_reg, bubble_zone, post_bubble, ft_zone} → hand count
top_level_keys.stats_by_phase: v7.14 NEW. Per-phase stat breakdown keyed by phase name (late_reg, post_reg, bubble_zone, post_bubble, ft_zone, unknown) + '_overall' comparison row. Each phase entry: {n_hands, vpip, pfr, three_bet, three_bet_opps, fold_to_3bet, cbet_flop, wwsf, saw_flop, mistakes, mistakes_per_100, net_bb, bb_per_100}. '_overall' is a light subset: {vpip, pfr, mistakes_per_100, bb_per_100}. Used by report Del 2A++ to surface phase-specific leaks (ICM-critical phases often have low volume but high mistake rates).
top_level_keys.intra_session_arc: v7.14 NEW. Quartile-based session arc for tilt/fatigue detection. {quartiles: [{quartile, n_hands, mistakes, mistakes_per_100, vpip, net_bb, bb_per_100, first_hand_id, last_hand_id, first_time, last_time}], tilt_flag: bool, tilt_note: str}. tilt_flag raised when Q4 mistakes/100 >= 2x Q1 with n>=20 per quartile. Computed from hands sorted by (date, hand_time). Empty quartiles + tilt_note='insufficient volume' when N<20.
top_level_keys.eai_ev_adjusted: v7.14 NEW. EV-adjusted wins vs expectation for EAI hands. {preflop: {expected_wins, actual_wins, total_spots, delta_wins, expected_win_pct, actual_win_pct}, postflop: same shape, avg_eai_pot_bb: float (avg stack as pot proxy), approx_bb_variance_pf: float, approx_bb_variance_post: float, note: caveat string}. Negative delta = ran below EV (variance, not necessarily a leak). Positive delta = results flattered skill. Uses Quick Ref expected rates: PF ahead 80/flip 55/behind 20, Post ahead 85/flip 50/behind 25.

gem_report_data_json._description: Pre-staged data for report generation. Produced by generate_report_data(). Eliminates need to query gem_hands.json during report writing.

top_level_keys.avg_buyin: Average buy-in per bullet in dollars
top_level_keys.total_invested: Total dollars invested across all bullets
top_level_keys.buyin_breakdown: List of {tournament, bullets, cost} per tournament
top_level_keys.dates: List of unique dates in session
top_level_keys.sb_bvb_by_table_size: BvB split: full_ring (n>=6) vs short_handed (n<6) → {n, limp/raise/fold count+pct, hands[]}
top_level_keys.cbet_all_textures_hu_ip: C-bet by all 6 textures across ALL PFR HU IP (not just SRP): {texture → {opps, bets, pct}}
top_level_keys.cr_evidence_hands: All check-raise hands: [{id, date, tournament, cards, position, street, board, holding, net_bb}]
top_level_keys.deviation_evidence: 2-3 hands per deviation type: {type → [{id, date, tournament, cards, pos, bb, severity, detail}]}
top_level_keys.deviation_base_rates: Denominators per type: {type → {total, clear, marginal, base, base_label, clear_pct, marginal_pct}}
top_level_keys.deep_run_trajectories: Per deep run: [{tournament, levels: [{level, stack_bb}], key_moments: [{id, level, cards, net_bb, line}]}]
top_level_keys.clinical_candidates: Pre-selected clinical hands: [{id, date, tournament, cards, pos, bb, net_bb, line, reason, raw_hh}]
top_level_keys.gto_shortlist: GTO review candidates: [{id, date, tournament, cards, pos, bb, spot, question, raw_hh}]
top_level_keys.gto_export_path: Path to auto-generated GTO Wizard export file
top_level_keys.gto_export_count: v7.14 NEW. Number of hands actually exported (<=gto_export_cap)
top_level_keys.gto_export_cap: v7.14 NEW. Max hands in GTO export (currently 30). Sorted by EV-delta: tier 0 = mistakes with EV estimate (|EV| desc), tier 1 = missed river/probe, tier 2 = coolers/big pots, tier 3 = others.
top_level_keys.mistake_ev_estimates: EV estimate per mistake: [{id, type, estimated_ev_bb, reasoning}]. v7.14: J33-J37 rule-specific EV amounts added.
top_level_keys.hero_classification: Hero type based on phase distribution: {label, emoji, ft_pct, reasoning}
top_level_keys.tournament_phase_dist: Phase distribution with hand counts + percentages
top_level_keys.leak_persistence: Cross-session leak tracker: {current_leaks[], tracker: [{leak, status (🆕New/🔴Recurring/🟡Returned/✅Resolved), note, current (v7.14), target (v7.14), gap (v7.14), direction (v7.14: in_range/below/above)}], timeline: [{date, leaks[]}], summary: {new, recurring, returned, resolved}}. v7.14: each tracker entry now carries progress-vs-target fields. Applies to Non-SD Win, SD Aggressor, VPIP-PFR Gap, Caller IP Agg, HU C-Bet, MW C-Bet, BTN/CO Open, SB Steal, WWSF.
